race.comment: VIOLENT (12) wound up strongly last time out to finish half a length adrift in second over 1113m at Geraldton on debut. Should be winding up late again. RIVER BEAUTY (6) is finding the breakthrough elusive but this looks a fair bit easier for her and she gets in light with the 3kg claimer engaged. Finds the right race to break through. ROYAL RIVIERA (9) ran a better race last start at her second trip to the races, finishing fourth over 1113m at Geraldton. Coming along nicely and should be in the finish. COSTA STAR (5) has switched yards since finishing sixth two weeks ago over 1000m at this track. Can measure up for the new barn.
